key_segmental_shifts: New therapeutic foray into vaccines is doing well with ~21% YoY growth as per IQVIA MAT April '26
Traction from anti-diabetes/obesity drug Semaglutide (partnered with Novo, brand name Extensior) among stiff generic competition but higher than expected demand

management_guidance: Company plans to launch 75 new brands in the next 5 years
forward_growth_catalysts: Legacy power brands (top 10 brands CAGR ~9% between April 23-26) continue to drive growth
New product launch trajectory: +100 launches in last 12 years and another 75 planned for next 5 years
Semaglutide (Extensior) addressing anti-diabetes/obesity market with high demand
forward_structural_risks: Increasing generic competition in some power brands
Slowdown in key Novo Nordisk brands (Mixtard, Novomix) and de-growth in Rybelsus growth moderation
